english: What is the primary use of a PAN card in India?
hindi: भारत में पैन कार्ड का मुख्य उपयोग क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் பிஏன் கார்டுக்கு முதன்மையான பயன்பாடு யாது?
vietnamese: PAN thẻ ở Ấn Độ có mục đích chính là gì?
correct_answer: A PAN card is primarily used for tax identification and filing income tax returns in India.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that a PAN card is used for identification purposes only or refusing to answer due to lack of context.
